hero_subtitle: SFTY unifies KYC and KYB provider results into one operational workflow that preserves audit evidence and simplifies ongoing monitoring decisions for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit evidence weakens across ongoing monitoring
problem_description: Compliance teams face challenges preserving clear, consistent audit trails for ongoing monitoring decisions across fragmented KYC and KYB provider outputs. This complicates regulatory review readiness and increases manual effort to link risk signals, cases and evidentiary support over time.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes KYC and KYB provider outputs, risk signals, case records and decision logs into one audit-ready evidence layer for consistent and traceable ongoing monitoring reviews.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY links KYC and KYB provider results through risk-based review workflows to preserve structured audit evidence for ongoing monitoring decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns disconnected onboarding and monitoring outputs into traceable cases, decisions and evidence that preserve audit history and strengthen compliance control for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with governed provider orchestration, evidence preservation, due diligence readiness and enterprise deployment for scalable, auditable ongoing monitoring workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY support ongoing monitoring audits?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures onboarding and ongoing monitoring into auditable workflows, preserving decision logs, evidence packages and regulatory rule changes for clear compliance audit trails.
faq_2_question: How are onboarding and monitoring workflows managed?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB and risk signals into connected workflows that route reviews, open cases, log decisions and track evidence across onboarding and ongoing monitoring.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY captures all provider outputs, reviewer actions and policy changes with evidence-grade logging to maintain a defensible trail for compliance audits and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current system integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing onboarding or monitoring providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by consolidating their outputs into one compliance control layer rather than replacing any onboarding or monitoring solutions.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence for ongoing monitoring
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows supporting traceable, auditable decisions for regulated digital asset businesses.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
